{{Quote|If the wrong sort get their hands on ''[coaxium ultra]''—the ''Hutts'', the ''Pykes'', any upstart band of thugs or pirates—they could run blockades and outrun Republic patrols. They'd have a ''tactical advantage'' we couldn't counter.|Gara|<ref name="Mace Windu 1" />}}
'''Gara''' was a [[Jedi]] of the [[Jedi Order]] during the [[Republic Era]]. Alongside [[Grand Master]] [[Yoda]], Gara briefed the Jedi [[Mace Windu]] on the creation of [[coaxium ultra]], a new form of [[coaxium]], on the [[moon]] [[Ro Mira]] and the consequences if it were to fall into the hands of criminal organizations. Windu assumed he was being tasked with retrieving the formula, but Gara informed him that he was instead to locate [[Azita Cruuz]], who had stolen a shipment of coaxium ultra and had broadcasted an offer to trade it for [[Galactic Credit Standard|credits]] and passage offworld.<ref name="Mace Windu 1" />
